tagline: 39+ AI capabilities on your existing cameras
platform_highlights: Works on existing IP/RTSP cameras — no hardware replacement
On-premise edge AI — no video leaves the network
39+ AI capabilities in a single platform

categories.name: Face Recognition
categories.description: Real-time facial recognition that identifies individuals from watchlists, manages visitor access, and automates attendance — all on your existing cameras with no specialized hardware.
capabilities: Face Recognition — identity verification against watchlists
Visitor Management — auto-log entries and exits
Searchable Person Attributes — forensic search by appearance

categories.name: Restricted Area Monitoring
categories.description: Instantly detect unauthorized access to restricted zones, perimeter breaches, and dangerous area entries — with real-time alerts before incidents escalate.
capabilities: Restricted Zone Detection — alert on unauthorized entry
Perimeter Intrusion Detection — boundary breach alerts

categories.name: Vehicle Detection
categories.description: Comprehensive vehicle intelligence covering ANPR, traffic violation detection, speed measurement, and parking management for smarter city infrastructure.
capabilities: Red Light Violation Detection — automated penalties

categories.name: PPE Detection
categories.description: Real-time detection of safety gear compliance — helmets, vests, gloves, masks — with instant alerts for violations before accidents occur.
capabilities: Safety Vest Detection — high-visibility wear monitoring
No Face Mask Detection — health protocol enforcement
Safety Zone Compliance — protective area adherence

categories.name: Video Analytics
categories.tagline: Business intelligence from your camera feeds
categories.description: Transform passive camera feeds into actionable business intelligence — footfall, dwell time, occupancy, and engagement metrics delivered as real-time dashboards.
capabilities: Crowd Count & Estimation — real-time density detection

categories.name: Smart Surveillance
categories.description: Proactively surface dangerous behavior and emergencies the moment they unfold — weapons, violence, fires, and medical emergencies detected before they escalate.
capabilities: Person Collapse Detection — medical emergency alerts

categories.name: Retail Analytics
categories.description: Deep customer analytics for retail environments — shelf monitoring, advertisement engagement tracking, customer journey mapping, and product interaction analysis.

categories.name: Smart City Solutions
categories.description: Scalable AI platform for city-wide deployment — connecting thousands of cameras into a unified intelligence layer for traffic, safety, and public infrastructure management.
